money_flow_summary: Money flows from consumers and businesses through financial intermediaries who charge fees, spreads, and interest. AI is collapsing the cost of building financial tools to near zero for solo operators.

opportunities.title: AI Tax Deduction Finder for Freelancers
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connect to freelancer bank accounts via Plaid, scan 12 months of transactions with LLM, identify every deductible expense, generate a Schedule C worksheet. Target 60M+ US freelancers who overpay taxes by avg $1,200/yr.
opportunities.moat: Historical transaction data creates personalized baseline; tax season drives organic word-of-mouth
opportunities.first_step: Build Plaid Link + IRS Pub 535 deduction rules RAG; launch to Twitter freelancer communities in October
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: LLM reads ambiguous transaction descriptions and reasons about deductibility — a task rules engines can't replicate

competitors.name: TurboTax
competitors.weakness: Not AI-native; requires manual categorization; expensive at $89–$169/yr; no proactive deduction hunting

competitors.name: FlyFin
competitors.weakness: Exists but poor UX, limited integrations, not focused on deduction maximization

competitors.name: Keeper Tax
competitors.weakness: Subscription at $20/mo but shallow bank integration, no real AI reasoning on ambiguous expenses

opportunities.gap: No product proactively scans transactions and explains *why* each expense is deductible with IRS citations. Freelancers don't know what they're missing.
poc_steps: Sign up for Plaid developer account (free sandbox, 1 day)
Write a Claude prompt that takes 20 transaction descriptions and classifies each as deductible/not + reason
Build a simple web form where user pastes their bank CSV and gets a deduction report
Post in r/freelance and r/personalfinance with a free tool link

opportunities.title: AI SMB Invoice & Cash Flow Agent
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Plaid + QuickBooks connected AI agent that auto-categorizes invoices, predicts cash flow gaps 30 days out, drafts payment reminder emails. Charge $49–$199/mo to SMBs with $1M–$10M revenue.
opportunities.moat: Plaid data integration creates switching cost; accounting firm distribution creates B2B2B moat
opportunities.first_step: Sign up for Plaid developer + QuickBooks sandbox; build MVP cash flow forecasting dashboard in 1 weekend
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: LLM parses unstructured invoice PDFs, drafts collection emails, explains cash flow forecasts in plain language

competitors.name: QuickBooks
competitors.weakness: Generic; no proactive cash flow AI; no automated AR follow-up; expensive at $35–$100/mo

competitors.name: Bill.com
competitors.weakness: Enterprise-focused; $45/user/mo; no cash flow prediction; purely workflow, not intelligent

competitors.name: Ramp / Brex
competitors.weakness: Spend management only, not AR/AP; requires their card; not applicable to most SMBs

opportunities.gap: No affordable tool proactively predicts cash flow crises and takes action (sends reminders, flags late payers) before the SMB runs out of money.
poc_steps: Build a Google Sheets + Claude integration: paste invoice list, get cash flow forecast + top 3 follow-up actions
Demo to 3 SMB owners in your network
Build basic web UI with CSV upload
Post in SMB owner Facebook groups

opportunities.title: RegTech Compliance Brief Generator for Crypto
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Scrape SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, EU MiCA feeds daily. LLM summarizes impact per business type. Sell $299–$999/mo to crypto compliance teams who otherwise pay lawyers $500+/hr.
opportunities.moat: Regulatory corpus grows over time creating proprietary RAG database; first-mover brand in vertical
opportunities.first_step: Set up RSS/webhook for SEC.gov, CFTC.gov; build LLM summarization pipeline; launch with 5 free beta users in crypto Telegram
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI monitors regulatory feeds 24/7, correlates new rules against client business model, flags material changes

competitors.name: Lexology / Mondaq
competitors.weakness: Not crypto-specific; curated by humans; $2k–$10k/mo; not actionable

competitors.name: ComplyAdvantage
competitors.weakness: AML/sanctions focused, not regulatory change tracking; enterprise pricing $500k+/yr

competitors.name: None dominant
competitors.weakness: Crypto RegTech is fragmented; no clear winner for SMB crypto companies under 50 employees

opportunities.gap: Crypto companies need regulatory updates translated into 'what does this mean for MY business' — not generic legal summaries. No affordable tool does this.
poc_steps: Set up free RSS feed monitoring for SEC.gov enforcement section (1 hour)
Write Claude prompt: 'summarize this SEC enforcement action and tell me if it affects a crypto exchange business'
Build email digest that sends daily summaries to 10 beta subscribers
Charge $99/mo after 2 weeks of free trial

opportunities.title: AI Personal Finance Coach (Budget Automation)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connect bank accounts via Plaid, analyze spending, send weekly personalized coaching messages with specific actions. Charge $9.99/mo.
opportunities.moat: 12+ months spending data creates deeply personalized experience; habit formation creates retention
opportunities.first_step: Build Plaid Link + categorization + LLM coaching prompt; launch on Product Hunt
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: LLM generates genuinely personalized advice instead of generic tips — the difference between Mint (failed) and something that changes behavior

competitors.name: Mint (shut down 2023)
competitors.weakness: Shut down — proves demand but also proves generic budget tracking isn't enough

competitors.name: YNAB
competitors.weakness: Requires manual effort; $14.99/mo; no AI; steep learning curve; high churn

competitors.name: Copilot
competitors.weakness: iOS only; $13/mo; no proactive coaching, just visualization; US market focus

opportunities.gap: Mint proved people want this but gave up when the app showed pretty charts and did nothing actionable. AI coaching that tells you EXACTLY what to cancel and save is the missing piece.
poc_steps: Build Plaid Link integration + basic categorization (1 weekend)
Write weekly coaching prompt that outputs 3 specific actions
Send email with actions to 20 beta users (friends/family)
